description: Cool-season cereal crop; thrives in mild temperatures with moderate rainfall. Sensitive to heat stress above 30°C.
Warm-season legume; prefers hot and humid conditions. Fixes atmospheric nitrogen. Sensitive to frost and drought.
Versatile cereal crop; requires moderate rainfall and warm temperatures.
Water-intensive cereal crop; requires high temperatures and standing water or heavy rainfall.
Cash crop requiring a long frost-free period, plenty of heat, and plenty of sunshine.
Long-duration cash crop; needs hot and humid climate with abundant water supply.
Oilseed crop; performs best in sandy loam soils with warm growing conditions and moderate rainfall.
